rationale: Filled in missing scaffolding (Ordering, KeyTrait, VerusClone, StrictlyOrderedVec) and proved det_insert_equal by case-splitting on r1 vs r2 using KeyTrait::cmp_properties to derive a contradiction when r1 != r2 (using sortedness of post1@ and post2@), then concluding via Seq extensional equality (=~=) that post1@==post2@ and hence post1==post2.
